MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: PLAINTIFF RAYMOND OWENS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Per Order of the Presiding Judge, this matter is assigned to Judge Kramer. The hearing is set for May 21, 2014 at 1:30 p.m. in Dept. 303. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
